tasks.title: 1.1 Add theming metadata to token-sets.json entries
tasks.description: Add optional theming object with primary_color and background_color to token set entries that have known theming values
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN token-sets.json has existing entries
WHEN theming metadata is added to entries that have known primary/background colors
THEN entries like rijkshuisstijl, amsterdam, utrecht, denhaag, rotterdam, vng include a theming object with primary_color and background_color
AND entries without known theming values have no theming field
AND the file remains valid JSON

tasks.title: 1.2 Create img/logos/ and img/backgrounds/ directories with initial images
tasks.description: Create directory structure and add initial organization logo and background image files
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN token sets with theming metadata referencing logo/background paths
WHEN the referenced files are checked
THEN they exist on disk and are valid image files (SVG/PNG/JPG/WebP)

tasks.title: 2.1 Update TokenSetService to include theming metadata in output
tasks.description: Modify getAvailableTokenSets() to pass through theming metadata from token-sets.json
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN token-sets.json entries with theming metadata
WHEN getAvailableTokenSets() is called
THEN each token set in the response includes the theming object if present in the manifest
AND entries without theming metadata omit the field entirely

tasks.title: 3.1 Add GET /settings/theming endpoint
tasks.description: Create endpoint that returns current Nextcloud theming values for comparison in the dialog
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the admin is authenticated
WHEN GET /settings/theming is called
THEN the response includes primary_color, background_color, logo_url, background_url, has_custom_logo, has_custom_background
AND non-admin access returns 403

tasks.title: 3.2 Add POST /settings/theming endpoint for colors
tasks.description: Create endpoint that updates Nextcloud theming colors via IConfig
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN valid hex colors are submitted
WHEN POST /settings/theming is called with primary_color and/or background_color
THEN Nextcloud's theming values are updated via IConfig
AND the cachebuster is incremented
AND invalid hex colors return 400

tasks.title: 3.3 Add image upload support to POST /settings/theming
tasks.description: Extend the theming endpoint to handle logo and background image uploads via ImageManager
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a logo or background path is submitted
WHEN POST /settings/theming is called with logo and/or background
THEN the file is read from nldesign's app directory and uploaded via ImageManager
AND path traversal attempts return 400
AND non-existent files return 400

tasks.title: 4.1 Replace radio buttons with select dropdown in admin template
tasks.description: Convert token set selector from radio buttons to a searchable select dropdown
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the admin opens nldesign settings
WHEN the page loads
THEN a select dropdown is rendered with all token sets as options
AND the currently active token set is pre-selected
AND options are sorted alphabetically by name

tasks.title: 4.2 Update admin.js for dropdown change handler
tasks.description: Update JavaScript to handle dropdown selection changes instead of radio button clicks
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the admin selects a different token set from the dropdown
WHEN the selection changes
THEN the token set is saved via POST /settings/tokenset
AND the preview section updates optimistically
AND a success/error notification is shown

tasks.title: 5.1 Add dialog HTML and CSS
tasks.description: Create the theming sync dialog with NC-style preview boxes, comparison table, and action buttons
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the dialog is triggered
WHEN it renders
THEN it shows a modal overlay with Current and Proposed Nextcloud-style preview boxes (230x140px, background + logo overlay)
AND a comparison table listing only values that differ
AND Cancel and Update theming buttons

tasks.title: 5.2 Add dialog trigger logic after token set change
tasks.description: After token set save succeeds, check for theming metadata and show dialog if values differ
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the admin selects a token set with theming metadata
WHEN the token set save succeeds
THEN GET /settings/theming is called to fetch current NC values
AND if any values differ, the dialog is shown
AND if no values differ or no theming metadata exists, no dialog appears

tasks.title: 5.3 Wire up dialog confirm/cancel actions
tasks.description: Handle Update theming and Cancel button clicks in the dialog
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the dialog is displayed
WHEN the admin clicks Update theming
THEN POST /settings/theming is called with all differing values
AND a success notification is shown and styles are refreshed
WHEN the admin clicks Cancel
THEN no theming values are changed and the dialog closes

tasks.title: 6.1 End-to-end test: theming sync dialog
tasks.description: Verify the full flow: select token set with theming, confirm dialog, verify NC theming updated
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN VNG token set has theming metadata with primary_color, background_color, and logo
WHEN the admin selects VNG from the dropdown and confirms the dialog
THEN Nextcloud's primary color, background color, and logo match VNG values
AND the theming page at /settings/admin/theming reflects the changes

tasks.title: 6.2 Test dropdown sorting and selection
tasks.description: Verify dropdown renders all token sets alphabetically and selection saves correctly
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN 39+ token sets exist
WHEN the admin opens the dropdown
THEN all entries are listed alphabetically
AND selecting any entry saves it correctly
